named-native-query.name: Message.count
named-native-query.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE om.available_at <= :counted_at AND om.delivery_count < :max_delivery_count) AS deliverable_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE om.available_at > :counted_at AND om.delivery_count < :max_delivery_count) AS deliverable_locked_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE om.available_at <= :counted_at AND om.delivery_count >= :max_delivery_count) AS undeliverable_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE om.available_at > :counted_at AND om.delivery_count >= :max_delivery_count) AS undeliverable_locked_count FROM outbox_message AS om

named-native-query.name: Message.peek
named-native-query.query: SELECT om.sequence_number, om.group_id, om.enqueued_at, om.available_at, om.lock_id, om.delivery_count, om.subject, om.body FROM outbox_message AS om WHERE om.sequence_number = :sequence_number

named-native-query.name: Message.peekAll
named-native-query.query: SELECT om.sequence_number, om.group_id, om.enqueued_at, om.available_at, om.lock_id, om.delivery_count, om.subject, om.body FROM outbox_message AS om ORDER BY om.sequence_number ASC OFFSET :offset FETCH NEXT :limit ROWS ONLY

named-native-query.name: Message.lockAllDeliverable
named-native-query.query: UPDATE outbox_message AS om SET available_at = :available_at, lock_id = :lock_id, delivery_count = delivery_count + 1 WHERE (om.group_id, om.sequence_number) IN ( SELECT group_id, MIN(sequence_number) FROM outbox_message WHERE available_at <= :locked_at AND delivery_count < :max_delivery_count GROUP BY group_id ORDER BY MIN(sequence_number) FETCH FIRST :limit ROWS ONLY) AND om.available_at <= :locked_at AND om.delivery_count < :max_delivery_count AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM outbox_message WHERE sequence_number < om.sequence_number AND group_id = om.group_id AND ( available_at > :locked_at OR delivery_count >= :max_delivery_count))

named-native-query.name: Message.lockAllUndeliverable
named-native-query.query: UPDATE outbox_message AS om SET available_at = :available_at, lock_id = :lock_id WHERE (om.group_id, om.sequence_number) IN ( SELECT group_id, MIN(sequence_number) FROM outbox_message WHERE available_at <= :locked_at AND delivery_count >= :max_delivery_count GROUP BY group_id ORDER BY MIN(sequence_number) FETCH FIRST :limit ROWS ONLY) AND om.available_at <= :locked_at AND om.delivery_count >= :max_delivery_count AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM outbox_message WHERE sequence_number < om.sequence_number AND group_id = om.group_id AND available_at > :locked_at)

named-native-query.name: Message.peekAllLocked
named-native-query.query: SELECT om.sequence_number, om.group_id, om.enqueued_at, om.available_at, om.lock_id, om.delivery_count, om.subject, om.body FROM outbox_message AS om WHERE om.available_at > :peeked_at AND om.lock_id = :lock_id ORDER BY om.sequence_number ASC

named-native-query.name: Message.requeueLocked
named-native-query.query: UPDATE outbox_message AS om SET available_at = :requeued_at, lock_id = NULL, delivery_count = 0 WHERE om.sequence_number = :sequence_number AND om.available_at > :requeued_at AND om.lock_id = :lock_id

named-native-query.name: Message.requeueAllLocked
named-native-query.query: UPDATE outbox_message AS om SET available_at = :requeued_at, lock_id = NULL, delivery_count = 0 WHERE om.sequence_number IN (:sequence_numbers) AND om.available_at > :requeued_at AND om.lock_id = :lock_id

named-native-query.name: Message.dequeueLocked
named-native-query.query: DELETE FROM outbox_message AS om WHERE om.sequence_number = :sequence_number AND om.available_at > :dequeued_at AND om.lock_id = :lock_id

named-native-query.name: Message.dequeueAllLocked
named-native-query.query: DELETE FROM outbox_message AS om WHERE om.sequence_number IN (:sequence_numbers) AND om.available_at > :dequeued_at AND om.lock_id = :lock_id
